name: Student Peace Ambassador
issuer: MIT World Peace University · UNESCO Chair
description: Appointed Student Peace Ambassador at the 8th World Parliament of Science, Religion & Philosophy (3–5 April 2022), MIT-WPU Pune. Session theme: A Spirituality Oriented Scientific Laboratory for World Peace. Recognised for contribution to establishing a culture of Peace, Tolerance, and Harmony.

name: IdeaIn10 — Runner-Up
issuer: MIT World Peace University · IET Pune LN
description: Runner-Up in Round I of the IdeaIn10 Presentation Competition, organised by the School of Computer Engineering and Technology, MIT-WPU Pune, in association with The IET Pune Local Network. 17 December 2021.

name: Speak It Out — SIH Innovation Fund Approved
issuer: MIT World Peace University · Smart India Hackathon
description: Innovation funding of ₹1,00,000 approved for the 'Speak It Out' project through the MIT-WPU Hackathon (Smart India Hackathon). Applied for ₹73,000; approved and disbursed at ₹1,00,000 — recommended for funding by the university. Faculty guide: Dr. Pradnya S. Kulkarni.

name: Final Year Project Certificate — C-DAC Pune
issuer: Centre for Development of Advanced Computing (C-DAC) · Strategic Projects Group, Ministry of Electronics & IT, Govt. of India
description: Certified completion of Final Year Project 'Domain Identification for Named Entity Disambiguation' at C-DAC Applied AI Group, Panchavati, Pune. Jan 1 – Jun 30, 2022. Signed by Ms. Swati Mehta (Associate Director & Programme Director, SPG), guided by Dr. Krishnanjan Bhattacharjee (Joint Director) and project engineers Mr. Aakash Bakhle and Mr. Abhishek Tomar.

name: Online Quiz — Knowledge of World
issuer: Priyadarshini Bhagwati College of Engineering · Students Cell
description: Certificate of Participation for the Online Quiz competition on 'Knowledge of World', organised by the Internal Quality Assurance Cell. Jun 8–10, 2020.

name: Basic UI/UX Design Workshop
description: Certificate of Participation for completing the workshop on Basic UI/UX Design, organised by MIT-WPU School of Computer Engineering and Technoborg in collaboration with DesignBoat UI/UX School.

name: Online Workshop on Accelerated Data Science
issuer: IIT Kharagpur · NVIDIA · National Supercomputing Mission
description: Certificate of Participation for attending the Online Workshop on Accelerated Data Science, conducted by NSM Nodal Centre, IIT Kharagpur and NVIDIA, under the aegis of the National Supercomputing Mission. Feb 20–21, 2021.
